title: Check If All 1's Are at Least Length K Places Away
titleCn: 是否所有 1 都至少相隔 k 个元素

testcases.input: nums = [1,0,0,0,1,0,0,1], k = 2 Output: true Explanation: Each of the 1s are at least 2 places away from each other.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: Each of the 1s are at least 2 places away from each other.

testcases.input: nums = [1,0,0,1,0,1], k = 2 Output: false Explanation: The second 1 and third 1 are only one apart from each other.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: The second 1 and third 1 are only one apart from each other.
